audit_methods: manual review of each gate check function

findings.description: All 8 CTRL-LOOP gate checks implemented and verified. run_all_gate_checks() returns PASS on valid nominal inputs, BLOCKED on each individual failure.
findings.evidence: tests/test_ctrl_loop_closure.py: 50 tests covering nominal + adversarial cases for all 8 checks

findings.description: Each gate check is fail-closed: missing inputs return BLOCKED, not PASS. No silent passes possible.
findings.evidence: test_blocked_non_dict, test_blocked_empty_lists, test_blocked_non_dict_input tests all verify fail-closed behavior

findings.description: Check 8 (falsification) correctly emits finding_artifact when no falsifying policy exists, and verifies policy inversion when one does exist.

ctrl_loop_gates.py is not yet wired into the live execution path (no callers in production orchestration). Tests exercise the gate module directly but the integration with control_loop.py and sel_orchestration_runner.py is pending.
findings.resolution: Logged for post-checkpoint follow-up. Gate module is available and tested; integration is non-blocking for Checkpoint L certification.

summary.notes: All 8 CTRL-LOOP gate checks pass. RT3-004 integration gap is non-blocking for Checkpoint L.
